name: Eczema
symptoms: dry skin, itching, redness, irritation, inflammation, rough skin
description: Eczema is a skin condition that causes dryness, itching, redness, and irritation. It may appear on the face, hands, or other parts of the body.
next_steps: Use moisturizers, avoid irritants, and consult a dermatologist if symptoms get worse.

name: Psoriasis
symptoms: red patches, scales, thick skin, itching, inflammation
description: Psoriasis is a chronic skin condition that causes red patches covered with white or silvery scales.
next_steps: Consult a dermatologist, reduce stress, and follow the recommended treatment.

name: Acne
symptoms: pimples, blackheads, whiteheads, inflammation, oily skin
description: Acne is a common skin condition that appears with pimples, clogged pores, and inflammation.
next_steps: Maintain good hygiene, use suitable skincare products, and see a doctor if it becomes severe.

name: Rosacea
symptoms: facial redness, swelling, burning sensation, visible blood vessels
description: Rosacea usually affects the face and causes persistent redness, sensitivity, and sometimes bumps.
next_steps: Avoid heat and triggers, and consult a dermatologist.

name: Fungal Infection
symptoms: itching, redness, circular patches, peeling skin, infection
description: Fungal skin infections may cause patches, itching, and redness in different areas of the body.
next_steps: Keep the area clean and dry, and use antifungal treatment based on medical advice.
